originalTitle: Reinforcement learning research with Joseph Suarez
title: Replacing Score-Based Admission with Advantage in Puffer 5 Curriculum Learning
summary: Worked on generalizing the curriculum learning algorithm in Puffer 5 by replacing score-based segment admission and retention with advantage metrics. Removed most domain knowledge dependencies, reducing to about 10% remaining, while debugging latching issues and dealing with problematic LLM-generated code.
